# Threat Assessment Guide

This tutorial walks through creating a threat assessment
using the Gemara schema.

## Scope Definition

Define the scope of your threat assessment.

## Capability Identification

Identify the capabilities of the system under assessment.

## Threat Identification

Identify threats to the system.

## CUE Validation

Validate your threat assessment against the Gemara schema.
